findings.title: Reset-token digest comparison is not constant-time
Reset-token verification does not consume the token
findings.quote: if (!record || record.used || record.expiresAt < Date.now()) return false;

reasoning: The repository otherwise evidences bcrypt cost 12, CSPRNG reset-token generation, a generic reset response, and a limiter registered before the only auth route. Reset-token verification uses direct equality and no repository code marks the token as used after successful verification, so the check fails.
